headline: Is GE HealthCare Technologies (GEHC) Now Attractive After Recent Share Price Slide?
summary: Wondering whether GE HealthCare Technologies stock at around US$60.76 is starting to look interesting on value, or if the risks still outweigh the potential upside. The share price has been under pressure recently, with the stock down 4.3% over the last week, 17.3% over the past month, 26.6% year to date and 16.8% over the last year. This naturally raises questions about how the current price lines up against underlying fundamentals. Recent coverage has centered on how the company is...
